name: Crab Stuffed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake 4 large baking potatoes until cooked through.
2. Scoop out the insides and set aside.
3. In a bowl, mix together margarine (or butter), sour cream, grated onion, and salt using an electric hand mixer on low speed for one minute.
4. Gently fold in crabmeat with a fork.
5. Fill each potato with the mixture and sprinkle generously with paprika.
6. Place potatoes back in the oven and reheat at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15 minutes.
